Cut Middlemen, Keep Yield

100% Control

Earn 6%* per year from leading financial platforms
* Current rate, but yield varies based on market conditions, over time and the user chosen asset.
Get up to 4%* Cashback on every purchase
* Cashback rate 0-4% based on how many GNO tokens the user holds.
Spend stablecoins with the first self-custodial debit card
All your tokens, collectibles, DeFi and rewards in one place
Free and fast crypto bank transfers
Send, swap, bridge tokens at the best rates
Your Assets, Your Freedom
Unlike a bank, Zeal is self-custodial. You have complete control over your assets—no one else can access them. But self-custodial finance is unregulated, so with freedom comes the responsibility to manage your assets securely.
Protected by your biometrics. Unlike typical wallets, you don't have to worry about seed-phrases. Zeal uses passkeys instead. Learn more
Built using Safe technology. Onchain infrastructure that secures more than $100B in value. Learn more
Protected by your biometrics. Unlike typical wallets, you don't have to worry about seed-phrases. Zeal uses passkeys instead. Learn more
Built using Safe technology. Onchain infrastructure that secures more than $100B in value. Learn more

any web3 app
Use your favourite apps on PC with the Zeal Chrome extension.
Free and fast on/off ramping to your bank account
All your tokens, collectibles, DeFi and rewards in one place
Connect your Ledger or Trezor
Currently only supported in Zeal browser extension and not mobile.
Safety checks for every transaction
Audited every <6 months and developed with rigorous security practices
See audit reports
Public sourced. Uses well-established cryptographic libraries
